title: The Summer Surprise
setting: A mysterious forest near a small town

scenes.text: When Timmy discovered his summer vacation would be spent in his grandparents' quiet town, he felt disappointed. But then, he found an old map hidden in his grandpa's attic, promising a hidden treasure. His heart pounded with excitement as he decided to set off on this unexpected adventure.
scenes.image_description: Timmy studying an old treasure map by the light of a dusty attic window

scenes.text: Following the map, Timmy entered the mysterious forest. He met Whisper, a chatty squirrel who offered to guide him. Together, they crossed bubbling streams and climbed ancient trees, sharing laughter and stories along the way.
scenes.image_description: Timmy and Whisper walking side by side across a babbling brook

scenes.text: Finally, they reached a breathtaking waterfall cascading into a crystal-clear pool. Behind it, Timmy found the hidden treasure – not gold or jewels, but a beautifully carved wooden chest filled with letters and mementos from his parents' own adventures in this magical place.
scenes.image_description: Timmy discovering the treasure chest behind the waterfall, Whisper peeking over his shoulder

meta.enhanced_prompt: A curious boy sets off on an adventurous journey filled with surprises during his unexpected summer trip.
